pkmn.lore: Emerged to give shape to will. When the world was still new, it granted resolve to humanity, allowing action, choice, and determination to take form. Its presence steels the spirit of the gods of time and space.

hiddenAbility.nerf: When slotted as a non-hidden ability: Speed reduced to x1.5
When slotted as a non-hidden ability: Damage reduced to x1.5
When slotted as a non-hidden ability: Speed reduced to x1.5

common.lore: The embodiment of wishing, awakening only once in a thousand years. In those brief moments, it listens to the desires carried in the hearts of others, and its power brings those wishes into reality.
